summary: Regression test after frontend code-quality refactor (Hero/Experience/Projects/Contact/About sub-component extraction, stable id keys). Backend unchanged: 7/7 pytest tests pass (health, profile shape with 4 stats/4 projects, github repos fallback supported, contact POST valid + invalid email 422 + missing fields 422 + GET list). Frontend: new stable testids verified — hero-stat-throughput/uptime/users/debt, award-item-pat/collab/hack. All 4 project cards (diagramai, budget-planner, cardamageestimatorv2, devportfolio) render. Smooth-scroll nav works for skills/projects/experience/contact. Mobile menu toggle opens/closes (5 nav-mobile-* links). Contact form: invalid email blocked via HTML5 validity, valid submission shows success banner and clears all fields. No regressions found.
critical_code_review_comments: Refactor is clean: Hero stats keyed by stable ids ('throughput','uptime','users','debt') and use a StatTile sub-component; Experience awards keyed by ('pat','collab','hack') and bullets have stable ids; Projects use ProjectCard component and a useGithubRepos hook; Contact slimmed via useContactForm hook + ContactInfo/ContactForm/StatusBanner/Field sub-components. Good separation of concerns.

Field testids in Contact use prefix 'contact-form-' (e.g., contact-form-name) while submit uses 'contact-submit' and banners 'contact-success'/'contact-error'. Naming is consistent enough but a unified prefix (contact-form-submit / contact-form-success) would improve discoverability — minor nit only.
Mobile menu uses 'nav-mobile-{id}' testids while desktop uses 'nav-link-{id}'. Worth documenting for future testing agents (already noted in context_for_next_testing_agent).
No behaviour-affecting changes detected; backend untouched.
seed_data_creation: Two TEST_Regress_* contact messages inserted during this iteration (in addition to iteration_1's TEST_User_* / TEST_PW_* entries). Safe to leave or purge by name prefix TEST_.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/test_portfolio_api.py (pytest, 7 tests, all green). Stable hero stat testids: hero-stat-throughput|uptime|users|debt. Stable award testids: award-item-pat|collab|hack. Project card testids: project-card-{diagramai|budget-planner|cardamageestimatorv2|devportfolio}. Contact form field testids: contact-form-{name|email|subject|message}; submit: contact-submit; banners: contact-success / contact-error. Desktop nav links: nav-link-{about|skills|projects|experience|contact}; mobile nav links (only visible after clicking nav-menu-toggle on <md viewport): nav-mobile-{...}. Use wait_until='domcontentloaded' + ~2s buffer for initial nav; 'networkidle' will hang due to continuous WebGL animation.
